title: plocama brevifolia subsp. brevifolia
intro: Plocama brevifolia subsp. brevifolia, also known as the dwarf Plocama, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Plocama brevifolia subsp. brevifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or a tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some regions of the world.
